2604.05689.title: CRFT: Consistent-Recurrent Feature Flow Transformer for Cross-Modal Image Registration
2604.05689.paper_summary: We present Consistent-Recurrent Feature Flow Transformer (CRFT), a unified coarse-to-fine framework based on feature flow learning for robust cross-modal image registration. CRFT learns a modality-independent feature flow representation within a transformer-based architecture that jointly performs feature alignment and flow estimation. The coarse stage establishes global correspondences through multi-scale feature correlation, while the fine stage refines local details via hierarchical feature fusion and adaptive spatial reasoning. To enhance geometric adaptability, an iterative discrepancy-guided attention mechanism with a Spatial Geometric Transform (SGT) recurrently refines the flow field, progressively capturing subtle spatial inconsistencies and enforcing feature-level consistency. This design enables accurate alignment under large affine and scale variations while maintaining structural coherence across modalities. Extensive experiments on diverse cross-modal datasets demonstrate that CRFT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art registration methods in both accuracy and robustness. Beyond registration, CRFT provides a generalizable paradigm for multimodal spatial correspondence, offering broad applicability to remote sensing, autonomous navigation, and medical imaging. Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/NEU-Liuxuecong/CRFT.
2604.05689.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一種一致性-重複特徵流Transformer（CRFT），這是一個基於特徵流學習的統一粗到細框架，用於穩健的跨模態影像配準。<lb/>CRFT在基於Transformer的架構中學習模態獨立的特徵流表示，該架構共同執行特徵對齊和流場估計。<lb/>粗略階段通過多尺度特徵相關性建立全局對應，而細緻階段則通過層次特徵融合和自適應空間推理來細化局部細節。<lb/>為了增強幾何適應性，一種迭代的差異引導注意機制與空間幾何變換（SGT）反復細化流場，逐步捕捉微妙的空間不一致並強化特徵級一致性。<lb/>這種設計使得在大仿射和尺度變化下能夠準確對齊，同時保持跨模態的結構一致性。<lb/>在各種跨模態數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，CRFT在準確性和穩健性方面始終超越了最先進的配準方法。<lb/>除了配準之外，CRFT還提供了一種可泛化的多模態空間對應範式，對遙感、自主導航和醫學影像等領域具有廣泛的應用性。<lb/>代碼和數據集可在 https://github.com/NEU-Liuxuecong/CRFT 上公開獲得。
2604.05689.author: Xuecong Liu et.al.
2604.05689.authors: Xuecong Liu, Mengzhu Ding, Zixuan Sun, Zhang Li, Xichao Teng
